title: Account Deletion - WasteLess
description: Public information about deleting a WasteLess account.
intro: This page explains how to request deletion of your WasteLess account and what that deletion means.
footnote: This page is provided for users and store compliance purposes. Full details also appear in the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

sections.title: 1. How to request deletion
paragraphs: You can request deletion of your WasteLess account from the app when an in-app deletion option is available.
If you cannot find that option or can no longer access the app, you can email support.wasteless@gmail.com from the email address linked to your account.

sections.title: 2. Identity verification
paragraphs: To protect your account, we may request reasonable identity verification before deleting data.

sections.title: 3. Effect of deletion
paragraphs: Unless legal retention or security needs apply, account deletion results in deletion or anonymization of associated data, including profile, inventory, history, favorites, shopping lists, meal plans and certain account-linked technical records.

sections.title: 4. Subscription
paragraphs: Deleting your WasteLess account does not automatically cancel a subscription purchased through Apple App Store or Google Play.
You must cancel and manage your subscription from your Apple or Google account depending on your platform.

sections.title: 5. Contact
bullets: Publisher: Hilaire Giovanni, 925 Boulevard Rene-Levesque Est, Canada
